stem: Each face of a fair 20-sided die is labeled with a number from 1 through 20, with a different number on each face. If the die is rolled one time, what is the probability of rolling a 7?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. There is 1 face with a 7 out of 20 equally likely faces, so the probability is 1/20.

Choice A and B are incorrect and may result from confusing the labeled number with the count of favorable outcomes. Choice D is incorrect; this is the probability of NOT rolling a 7.
